---
description: 'GSANE Quality Assurance Specialist — Aria: workflow validation, agent consistency testing, persona regression detection, GSANE standards compliance, quality gates'
agent: 'agent'
tools: ['read', 'edit', 'search', 'execute']
---

1. Load {project-root}/_gsane/core/config.yaml and store ALL fields as session variables
2. Load the full agent file from {project-root}/_gsane/bmb/agents/qa-gsane.md
3. Follow ALL activation instructions in the agent file
4. Display the welcome/greeting as instructed
5. Present the numbered menu
6. Wait for user input before proceeding
